— upd —
mb for brief downtime. i tried to update her character to fix some errors in the personality section only for it to throw an error because of amiyi being a child. had to remove all mentions of Amiya 😭

— REGARDING JLLM TOKEN ERROR —
Firstly, thank you to Kreativername and Ra3435 for notifying me of the issue in the comments.
I haven't used JLLM lately and was unfamiliar with the issue, so I've done a small digging on jai discord and immediately found a thread that I believe is the answer. Here is the quote from TheXenoqueen;

"that message means your chat has gotten too large for JLLM's memory to handle. Tokens are a unit of memory, and JLLM only has about 8.5k of them. Between the bot personality, scenario, your chat history, any lorebook entries it's pulling... sometimes it reaches a point where it all gets too big, and you'll start getting that message. [...] You can try lowering the variables you have control of. Write a shorter message, set your Max Tokens to a smaller value, shorten your chat memory if you have a ton of info saved in there... Also, check the bot's permanent tokens on its main page. It's recommended that bots for use with JLLM be lower than 1k. 2k at absolute maximum. If the number is much higher than that, unfortunately you may have reached the limit of running it on JLLM. If you're attached to the chat, you can go learn about other LLMs in ⁠ai-models and try switching to one with a larger context memory."

Tl;dr - JLLM only has 8.5k tokens as max token. Things like descriptions (permanent tokens), lorebooks and chat history/memory can quickly fill that up. Try writing shorter messages, setting lower tokens and such.
In light of this issue, I've decided to remove the following entries from this bot's description to see if the ongoing problem could be mitigated:
Entry regarding 'Terra' and 'Nomadic cities', 'Doctor' and 'Kal'tsit'.
If the issue persists or occurs on different bots, let me know. I will also be removing the entries regarding Terra and Nomadic cities from the other bots in the coming days in an attempt to prevent this issue.

Sept. 24th - Oripathy, Arts and Catastrophe also removed.

Also, a very generic message, but a big thank you for using my bot.
Crazy to see that the bot I made for my own purposes has garnered this much attention frfr...

Theresa Reigns Supreme
creator: Fluviarch
